headline: Toll Brothers Stock Could Lead Homebuilder Rebound as Housing Stabilizes
summary: Toll Brothers is outperforming peers like Lennar, D.R. Horton, and PulteGroup as homebuilder stocks show signs of stabilizing despite ongoing headwinds.

headline: D R Horton Faces Plumbing Claims As Investors Weigh Valuation And Risks
summary: Georgia homeowners have filed arbitration claims against D.R. Horton, alleging defective PEX plumbing in recently built homes. Complaints focus on pipe failures within warranty periods and claim insufficient notification to potentially affected buyers. Reports of similar issues in other states raise the risk of broader litigation and reputational pressure for the homebuilder. D.R. Horton, traded as NYSE:DHI, is confronting fresh legal scrutiny at the same time its shares trade around...
